prompt: Take this product from idea to production and continue the complete product workflow.
用产品工厂把这个想法从想法到上线，并能继续流程。
Analyze this product idea, research competitors, and draft a PRD.
分析这个产品需求和用户问题，做竞品研究并更新 PRD。
Prepare OpenDesign input, then write the technical design and sprint plan.
根据已批准 PRD 做设计评审、技术方案和开发计划。
Hand these tasks to Claude Code, run code review, and prepare the release.
把任务交给 Claude Code，实现后做代码评审和发布准备。
Fix the spelling mistake in this sentence.
Explain what a binary tree is.
